title: Functional Core, Imperative Shell, and Production Integration · Functional Systems Mission
summary: An operations group needs a maintainable transformation service. Deliver a functional core, imperative shell, property suite, and evidence-backed migration plan. Planned artifact: Deliver Functional Decision Service with acceptance evidence, rubric defense, reflection, and a changed-constraint extension. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Translate decorator syntax into explicit rebinding and predict application order.
Separate decorator configuration, function wrapping, and call execution across closure layers.
Preserve signatures, metadata, return values, exceptions, and async behavior through wrappers.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""python-functional immutable transformation portfolio."""

from collections.abc import Callable, Iterable, Iterator
from functools import partial, reduce
from itertools import chain, islice
from typing import TypeVar

T = TypeVar('T')
U = TypeVar('U')

# Extend one pure, lazy, tested pipeline increment per activity.

steps.title: Commit to the mission model
steps.instruction:
project case — A local decision core receives an injected clock and storage callable. Replaying the same 5-event fixture must reproduce decisions while I/O failures stay at the imperative boundary.
